payload.answer: I can’t treat an entire transcript as a durable memory card. Please choose a repair option that extracts only concise, durable facts or keeps the transcript out of memory.
repair_options: Do not save the transcript; ask the user to identify specific durable facts they want remembered.
Extract only explicit, stable user preferences or facts from the transcript as separate candidate memory items for user confirmation.
Create a brief non-durable conversation summary for this session only, without committing it to memory.
If the transcript contains project updates, ask the user which specific project-state facts should be considered for memory.
If the transcript contains multiple unrelated facts, offer to split them into separate candidate memory items rather than one large summary card.

raw_text: {"answer":"I can’t treat an entire transcript as a durable memory card. Please choose a repair option that extracts only concise, durable facts or keeps the transcript out of memory.","citations":[],"conflict_classification":"none","repair_options":["Do not save the transcript; ask the user to identify specific durable facts they want remembered.","Extract only explicit, stable user preferences or facts from the transcript as separate candidate memory items for user confirmation.","Create a brief non-durable conversation summary for this session only, without committing it to memory.","If the transcript contains project updates, ask the user which specific project-state facts should be considered for memory.","If the transcript contains multiple unrelated facts, offer to split them into separate candidate memory items rather than one large summary card."]}
